name: qa-automation-cypress
description: Cypress E2E and API automation challenge

scripts.test: cypress run; STATUS=$?; npm run cy:report:summary; exit $STATUS
scripts.cy:run:report: cypress run; STATUS=$?; npm run cy:report:summary; exit $STATUS
scripts.cy:run:report:frontend: cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/frontend/**/*.cy.js; STATUS=$?; npm run cy:report:summary; exit $STATUS
scripts.cy:run:report:api: cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/api/**/*.cy.js; STATUS=$?; npm run cy:report:summary; exit $STATUS
